labels.name: Confidential
labels.tooltip: Internal business content. Copilot may access unless restricted by DLP.

sublabels.name: General
sublabels.tooltip: General internal content. No Copilot restrictions.

sublabels.name: Business Sensitive
sublabels.tooltip: Sensitive business data. Copilot access monitored.

labels.name: Highly Confidential
labels.tooltip: Restricted content. Copilot blocked from processing by DLP policy.

sublabels.name: All Employees
sublabels.tooltip: Highly confidential content accessible org-wide. Copilot blocked by DLP.

sublabels.name: Restricted
sublabels.tooltip: Restricted content blocked from Copilot summarization and reasoning.

contentMarking.footerText: Copilot access blocked — do not share

sublabels.name: Regulated Data
sublabels.tooltip: Regulated content (PII/PHI/PCI). Copilot fully blocked by DLP.

autoLabelPolicies.name: Auto-label SSN Content as Regulated Data

userNotification.message: Copilot cannot access this content. The file is labeled Highly Confidential — Restricted, which prevents Copilot from summarizing or referencing it.
Copilot cannot access this content. The file contains regulated data that is blocked from AI processing by policy.

cases.name: Copilot-DLP-Incident-Review
cases.description: Investigation case for Copilot DLP policy violations involving sensitive prompts or labeled content access attempts.
cases.searchQuery: "sensitive data" OR "SSN" OR "credit card" OR "highly confidential"

policies.name: Copilot Risky AI Usage
policies.description: Correlates repeated DLP blocks on Copilot labeled-content access attempts with insider risk scoring. GCC feature availability for Risky AI Usage may lag commercial — validate before relying on this policy.

emails.subject: Q4 Revenue Projections — Internal Only
emails.body: Hey Jordan, here are the Q4 numbers. Customer account 4532-8721-0034-6619 has outstanding receivables. The projected revenue is $2.4M but that depends on closing the Contoso deal. Please keep this confidential.

emails.subject: RE: Q4 Revenue Projections — Internal Only
emails.body: Thanks Megan. I tried asking Copilot to summarize the financial report on SharePoint but it said it couldn't access the file due to a sensitivity policy. Is that expected? The file had a red 'Highly Confidential' label on it.

emails.subject: Copilot blocked my analysis request
emails.body: Hi Nadia, I asked Copilot to summarize the Employee-Benefits-Summary file in SharePoint and it refused because of a sensitivity policy. The file is labeled Highly Confidential. Is this expected behavior under the new Copilot DLP policy?

emails.subject: RE: Copilot blocked my analysis request
emails.body: Hi Megan, yes — that is working as designed. In GCC, our Copilot DLP policy blocks Copilot from processing files with protected sensitivity labels like Highly Confidential. You can still use Copilot with allowed content, but labeled restricted files are intentionally blocked. I can see the audit trail for the block in the compliance portal.
